fields.description: A short label for this vehicle, e.g. "Truck 1" or "Ford F-250 (ABC-123)". Used as the record name, so keep it unique and stable.
fields.label: Vehicle Name / ID

fields.description: Retired vehicles are skipped by the nightly status refresh and reminders.
fields.label: Status

fields.description: Primary driver / who is responsible for this vehicle's upkeep.
fields.label: Assigned Driver

fields.description: Last recorded odometer reading (miles). Updated automatically from submitted maintenance logs; you can also set a starting value here.
fields.label: Current Odometer (mi)

fields.description: Computed from the cadence settings and the last logged services. Refreshed nightly and whenever a maintenance log is submitted. "No Data" = no baseline date recorded yet for any cadence.
fields.label: Maintenance Status
fields.options:
No Data
OK
Due Soon
Overdue

fields.description: Date the last weekly service was performed. Set automatically from submitted Weekly logs; seed it manually for a vehicle serviced before go-live.
fields.label: Last Weekly Service

fields.description: Last weekly service + the weekly interval (Settings).
fields.label: Weekly Service Due

fields.description: Date of the last oil change. Set automatically from submitted Oil Change logs; seed it manually for a vehicle serviced before go-live.
fields.label: Last Oil Change

fields.description: Last oil change + the oil-change interval (Settings, default 3 months).
fields.label: Oil Change Due

fields.description: Date of the last dealership check-up. Set automatically from submitted Dealership logs; seed it manually for a vehicle serviced before go-live.
fields.label: Last Dealership Check-Up

fields.description: Last dealership check-up + the interval (Settings, default 6 months).
fields.label: Dealership Check-Up Due

fields.description: Date the windshield wipers were last replaced. Set automatically from submitted Windshield Wipers logs; seed it manually for a vehicle serviced before go-live.
fields.label: Last Wiper Change

fields.description: Last wiper change + the interval (Settings, default 6 months).
fields.label: Wiper Change Due
